response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified video as a live performance segment from 'hololive 7th fes.' featuring 'Ridin' on Dreams'. 2. Mapped scenes based on singing/talking transitions. 3. Used search tool to find official lyrics for 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 4. Compiled scene-by-scene analysis and formatted to requested JSON schema.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance segment of the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT at the 'hololive 7th fes.' concert, interspersed with brief MC/talk segments by the performers. The video concludes with an outro title card.

scenes.description: The video begins with an introductory greeting from the VTubers. No vocal music is playing.
The song 'Ridin' on Dreams' begins with the VTubers singing and dancing on stage. The audience waves glowsticks.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ねえ、君がいたからだよ
ねえ、ありがとうを何度も
今すぐに伝えたいんだ
さあ乗り込もう！ ridin' on dreams
yeah!!
wow oh oh... 
hey!! (hey!!) hey!! (hey!!) 
yeah!!
あぁ小さな夢から想像できないような想いになったんだ
わくわく止まらない！
何度迷ったって僕ら絆が舵になる
ちょっとの不安だってさ吹き飛ばせちゃうんだよ
果てない旅路を今漕いでる途中に困難もあるでしょう
それも力に変えて一緒に進むんだよ！
ねえ、君がいたからだよねえ、夢では終われない
荒波も乗り越えていこう"らしく"輝いていたい
ねえ、君と会えたことがねえ、宝物だから
手を取り合い声かけ合って
地図など無い未知の世界でまだまだ行こう！
ridin' on dreams
...[Full lyrics provided in next scene for continuity]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Hey, it's because you were here
Hey, I want to tell you "thank you" many times, right now
Come on, let's ride on dreams, yeah!!
Wow oh oh... hey!! (hey!!) hey!! (hey!!) yeah!!
Ah, it's become a feeling I couldn't imagine from a small dream
The excitement won't stop!
No matter how many times we get lost, our bond becomes the rudder
We can blow away even a little bit of anxiety
We're rowing in the middle of an endless journey right now
There will be difficulties, but we'll turn them into strength and move forward together!
Hey, it's because you were here
Hey, we can't let it end as a dream
Let's overcome the rough waves and keep shining "like ourselves"
Hey, the fact that I could meet you
Hey, it's a treasure to me
Let's take each other's hands, call out to each other
In a world of unknown with no maps, let's keep going!
...[Full lyrics provided in next scene for continuity]

scenes.description: Performance continues, with a brief talk/MC segment in the middle. The song remains the background audio.

scenes.description: Final dance and performance of the song 'Ridin' on Dreams'.
Concert outro title card with text 'Ridin' on Dreams Supported by LAWSON'. No vocal music.
